description: Amidst the coronavirus crisis, maintain seamless communication with your school community through our colorful, minimalist email newsletter template. Ideal for elementary, middle, high school and preschool, this template is perfect for providing weekly updates about academic schedules, after school care, and day care arrangements. Its clean, professional design ensures maximum engagement, making it easy for parents and students to stay informed about their education progress during this challenging period. The template is also suitable for those who have transitioned to home school due to the pandemic. Keep your school community connected and engaged with this animated email template, providing a vibrant yet minimal way to convey important information.
short_description: Stay connected with your school community amidst the coronavirus crisis using our vibrant, minimalist email newsletter template. Ideal for all school levels, it assists in conveying weekly updates, schedules, and care arrangements. Ensure maximum engagement with its clean, professional design, perfect for home-schooling during this challenging period.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!
